homepage.title: Dieffenbacher Maschinen- und Anlagenbau
homepage.description: Discover efficient complete Dieffenbacher systems for the wood-based panel, composites and recycling industries.
homepage.text_excerpt:
Dieffenbacher Maschinen- und Anlagenbau
Welcome to Dieffenbacher
How can we help you move forward?
Enhance your competitive edge and profitability with advanced complete plants, systems solutions and services. Whether for the production of wood-based panels, composites and metal components, recycling plants or sustainable energy generation, our experts can find the best solution to meet your individual challenges. Let’s take the next step together.

Get ready for CEBRO
Your smart plant from DIEFFENBACHER
Using a holistic approach, CEBRO combines digitalization and advanced plant engineering with operational excellence and sustainability solutions. That makes your plant smart.
Find out more
Smart digitalization of complete plants with EVORIS
EVORIS for wood-based panel plants
EVORIS for forming plants
Your challenges in focus
Aside from advanced technical solutions, DIEFFENBACHER also focuses on working together as partners. We aspire to provide you with information relevant to you and your interests in a quicker manner. Here are four different examples.
More efficient use of technologies
Information for expert technicians
More profitable plant operation
Information for managers, proprietors and investors
Seamless project handling
Information for project managers
Trouble-free plant operation
